tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
(def all-linear (linear_issues))
(def issue-states (into {} (map (juxt :id :state)) all-linear))
(def non-done (filter (fn [pr] (not= "done" (get issue-states (:closes_linear pr)))) with-linear))
(count non-done)
"}

(count non-done)
"}
